_comment: Seed row for FinancialCalculationToolHandler (R6 task 104, FR-20). Pure-deterministic formula handler. Deploy via PAC CLI Web API POST or Power Automate dataflow. sprk_handlerclass MUST equal the C# class name for auto-discovery to route correctly.

row.sprk_description: Pure-deterministic, currency-aware financial formulas: simple/compound interest, present/future value, loan payment (amortization), ROI. All monetary math uses decimal. No LLM call.
row._comment_toolcode: R6 audit item 4 (2026-06-07): sprk_toolcode column extended manually from 10 to 100 chars. Renamed from 'FIN-CALC-FORMULA@v1' to descriptive 'FINANCIAL-CALCULATION'. NO @v1 suffix per cross-environment migration policy.
row._availableincontexts_comment: ToolAvailabilityContext.Playbook = 100000000 — formula handler exposed to playbook orchestration only by default. Promote to Both (100000002) once chat-facing JSON schema for inputs is authored.
row._configuration_comment: Default config = simple_interest with textbook values ($1000 @ 5% for 2y → $100). Per-invocation playbook nodes override formula + inputs at runtime via the AnalysisTool.Configuration override; this seed only documents the contract shape.

_instructions: Deploy to Spaarke Dev via PAC CLI Web API (or Power Automate dataflow):
Expected: one row returned with sprk_toolcode = 'FIN-CALC-FORMULA@v1'.

adrCompliance.ADR-010: Auto-discovery picks up handler — NO manual DI line.
adrCompliance.ADR-013: Handler in Services/Ai/Handlers/; CRUD-side code routes through PublicContracts facades (not relevant for this deterministic handler).
adrCompliance.ADR-015: Telemetry surface is handler name + formula name + outcome + duration + IDs ONLY. Never input values.
adrCompliance.ADR-029: Zero new NuGet packages; BFF publish-size delta ≪ 0.5 MB.
